mapper.select:
SELECT GROUP_CD AS groupCd, GROUP_NM AS groupNm, USE_YN AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_CODE_GROUP WHERE 1=1
AND ( UPPER(GROUP_CD) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{groupNm}) || '%' OR UPPER(GROUP_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{groupNm}) || '%' )
AND USE_YN LIKE concat('%', #{useYn}, '%')
ORDER BY GROUP_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_CODE_GROUP (GROUP_CD, GROUP_NM, USE_YN) VALUES (upper(#{groupCd}), #{groupNm}, #{useYn})
INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL (GROUP_CD, DETAIL_CD, DETAIL_NM, USE_YN) VALUES (upper(#{groupCd}), #{detailCd}, #{detailNm}, #{useYn})
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CD AS groupCd, DETAIL_CD AS detailCd, DETAIL_NM AS detailNm, USE_YN AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL ORDER BY GROUP_CD, DETAIL_CD
SELECT S.SERVER_ID AS serverId, S.SERVER_NM AS serverNm FROM mhdb.TB_SERVER S WHERE S.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY S.SERVER_NM
